title: Vivi Tries to Stop the War
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on vivi tries to stop the war, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Tries to Stop the War. As Luffy is gone and the armies clash, Crocodile’s plan appears to be working exactly as intended. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's still all this water underneath...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: This sandstorm should finish it off once and for all...

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: And its destruction will only further fuel the rebels' rage.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Such cliched empathy and pity for your fellow man is what will destroy this kingdom...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: The same applies for you as well, Straw-Eat Luffy.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: If you'd only thrown your worthless friendship away, you'd have lived to see another day!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Even all this water can't save you now...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You seem to be in agony...!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: But don't worry, you'll soon rest in peace... Hahaha!

summary: This part develops vivi tries to stop the war and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
